message:
fix(test): fix proptest_accounts duplicate account_id assertion (ft-2v2uy)

The select_winner_not_in_filtered test compared by account_id, but
the strategy can generate duplicate IDs across accounts with different
percent_remaining values. Replace the ID-based check with a threshold
invariant assertion: selected must be >= threshold, filtered must be
< threshold.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
